terms: 50% deposit required. Balance due upon completion.

upholstery.name: Sillón – Full Reupholstery

upholstery.name: Banco al Pie de Cama
upholstery.notes: Reupholstery banco estilo francés, patas doradas

max_analysis: Based on the reference photo, this is a sophisticated luxury master bedroom project. The room features floor-to-ceiling window treatments with a double-layer approach: sheer white underlayers for daytime privacy and elegance, paired with deep navy/steel blue ripplefold drapery as the main panels — motorized for effortless operation. The existing décor shows French-style furniture with gold accents and a tufted diamond headboard, so fabric selections should be high-end — Belgian linen, silk velvet, or a structured jacquard in deep navy would be ideal. The accent chair reupholstery in coordinating deep blue velvet will anchor the seating area and tie the entire room's color story together beautifully.
